name: Single filer - Median income
description: Single person earning €75,000 annually in Berlin, no children

sources.description: Income tax (€14,175) verified via BMF Einkommensteuer-Berechnungsprogramm 2025 for zvE=59,383 (single). Social security computed per official 2025 rates.
sources.notes: §32a EStG 2025 Zone 3: https://www.gesetze-im-internet.de/estg/__32a.html. Berlin (BE) standard care rate 2.4% childless. Health capped at €66,150. Deductions: Werbungskosten €1,230, Sonderausgaben €36, deductible insurance €14,350.73. zvE = 75,000 - 15,616.73 = 59,383.
